default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: Hmm? What are you doing behind that tree?

default.speaker: Danny
default.text: Setting up the ULTIMATE prank! I'm Danny, master of mischief!

default.speaker: Danny
default.text: I love treasure stories. My cousin went to Italy once and saw REAL ancient ruins!

default.speaker: Danny
default.text: The Colosseum! Gladiators fought there! How cool is that?!

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: Very cool, Danny. Try not to prank anyone too badly.

post.speaker: Danny
post.text: Psst! Want to help me put a frog in Higgins' coffee?

post.speaker: Pink Panther
post.text: I'll pretend I didn't hear that.

strange.speaker: Pink Panther
strange.text: Danny, calm down. What are you talking about?

strange.speaker: Danny
strange.text: I've been mapping the whole camp! It's just like ancient ruins!

strange.speaker: Danny
strange.text: There are gold paths under the ground... I can FEEL them!

strange.speaker: Danny
strange.text: A huge round arena... with arches... thousands of people cheering...

strange.speaker: Danny
strange.text: And tunnels underneath with hidden rooms full of treasure!

strange.speaker: Pink Panther
strange.text: An arena with arches... that sounds like the Colosseum in Rome.

strange.speaker: Danny
strange.text: I've never been to Rome! But I drew a map of it! Look!

postStrange.speaker: Danny
postStrange.text: The gold paths are getting clearer... arches and tunnels everywhere...

postStrange.speaker: Danny
postStrange.text: I've dug three holes behind the cabin already. Higgins is NOT happy.
